summary: Complete e2e testing of 3 new GoSocial features: Autopilot Campaigns, WhatsApp Integration, Instagram Integration. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully with all critical flows verified. Both integrations use SIMULATED APIs (not real WhatsApp/Instagram connections).
passed_tests: - POST /api/autopilot/campaigns creates campaign with steps and targeting criteria
- PUT /api/autopilot/campaigns/{id}/toggle requires at least one step (400 error)
BACKEND - Autopilot Campaign Simulate & Analytics (2 tests):
- POST /api/integrations/whatsapp/conversations/{id}/send sends message with simulated reply
- POST /api/integrations/instagram/conversations/{id}/send sends message with simulated reply
- Stats cards display (Total Campaigns, Active, Messages Sent, Replies)
- Create Campaign dialog opens with all form fields
- Platform selection toggles (instagram, facebook, linkedin, twitter, whatsapp)
- Status selection toggles (new, contacted, qualified, negotiation, closed, lost)
- Sequence Steps section with Add Step button
- Step message textarea, delay hours, A/B variant selector
- Preview dialog shows matching leads count and steps count
- Analytics dialog shows per-step performance metrics
- Edit dialog loads existing campaign data
- Toggle, Preview, Analytics, Edit, Delete buttons clickable
- WhatsApp card shows connection status and stats
- Instagram card shows connection status and stats
- Connect button opens dialog for unconnected platforms
- Open Inbox button navigates to platform inbox
- Conversation list shows contact name, handle, last message, status badges
- Chat view opens when clicking conversation
- Message input and Send button functional
- Simulated reply appears after sending message
- Dark mode theme applied correctly to new pages
- Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode
- All cards, dialogs, buttons use proper semantic colors
critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements
Campaign toggle correctly validates step requirement before activation
Simulated reply generation works correctly for demo purposes
Dark/light theme applies correctly to all new components
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create/delete TEST_ prefixed campaigns. WhatsApp and Instagram demo conversations seeded via /api/integrations/{platform}/seed-demo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Autopilot, WhatsApp, Instagram) fully tested and working. WhatsApp and Instagram integrations are SIMULATED (not real APIs). Sending a message auto-generates a simulated reply. Demo conversations are created via seed-demo endpoint. Campaign operations support full CRUD + toggle (activate/pause) + simulate (preview matching leads) + analytics (per-step metrics). Previous features (leads, CRM, analytics, templates, etc.) were tested in iterations 1-6.
